","auto_div_body":"

selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
4,580
Total Hours
10
Features
GRC
Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Key Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design 1,200h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress 640h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
In Progress 480h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do 420h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress 220h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design 380h
